findings.detail: No files classified as trade secret. All 1022 paths classified as publicly accessible.
No PATENT_REVIEW items identified. Banach-related theory files noted but classified as COMMERCIAL_PRIVATE_FUTURE with LOW confidence.
DISCLOSURE_FREEZE.md uses 'prohibited' language. This is advisory for internal use, not legally binding. Recommend adding disclaimer that this is an internal planning document.

DISCLOSURE_FREEZE.md and PUBLIC_BASELINE_MANIFEST.md should include disclaimer: 'This document is for internal project planning purposes only and does not constitute legal advice or create legal obligations.'
No COMMERCIAL_PRIVATE_FUTURE paths identified. No risk of overclaiming current public content as future-private.
